chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-757 of 2021 C.P. No.D-1838 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.03.2022 Mr. Syed Abid Ali Shah, advocate for petitioner in C.P. No.D- 757/2021. Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio advocate for petitioner in C.P. No.D- 1838/2021. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- M/s Syed Abid Ali Shah and Ayaz Hussain Tunio, learned counsel appearing for the petitioners, submit that they have recently received a modification which has set the controversy at rest and the petitioners’ grievance has been redressed. The statement along with modification is taken on record. Such being a statement, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that they have been instructed not to press these petitions. Accordingly, both the petitions are disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
